turns.query: Analyze how Shougang Qian'an Steel Company (company_id: 2452) emissions on 2025-06-10 at 16:00 affected air quality within a 5km radius.
turns.actual_response:
2025年6月10日16:00，首钢迁安钢铁公司排放烟气量为27812700.0立方米，NOx为203.04千克，SO₂为83.17千克，颗粒物为35.22千克。

企业周边5公里内共有4个空气质量站点，其中该时刻有2个有效读数。5公里范围内平均AQI为49.0，PM2.5为29.5，PM10为54.0，SO₂为6.0，NO₂为30.5。

与15:00相比，5公里范围内PM2.5上升1.0，PM10上升0.5，SO₂上升0.5；AQI下降0.5，NO₂下降3.0。说明该小时内颗粒物和SO₂有轻微升高，但整体空气质量未出现同步恶化。

与所在城市同期均值相比，5公里范围内PM2.5高5.34，PM10高3.91，但AQI低0.48，SO₂低0.31，NO₂低1.61。与所在区同期均值相比，PM2.5高1.61，但AQI低1.74，PM10低0.58，SO₂低0.58，NO₂低2.03。总体看，企业周边颗粒物水平略高于城市背景，但相对于所在区并未表现出全面升高。

周边10公里风场平均风速为2.45，平均来向角为242.95°，风场样本点数为4个。5公里范围内该时刻无空气质量高污染预警记录。

综合判断：该企业在16:00存在较高烟气量及NOx、SO₂、颗粒物排放，但5公里范围内空气质量仅表现为PM2.5、PM10和SO₂较前一小时轻微上升，AQI和NO₂未上升，且无高污染预警。基于已查询数据，未发现该小时排放导致周边5公里空气质量显著恶化的证据；建议监管侧继续关注颗粒物排放控制及下风向站点的连续小时变化。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

company_id = 2452
ts = "2025-06-10 16:00:00"

q = text("""
WITH comp AS (
  SELECT id, city_id, district_id, coordinate
  FROM polluting_company
  WHERE id = :company_id
),
emis AS (
  SELECT exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id AND timestamp = :ts
),
near_stations AS (
  SELECT a.id, a.city_id, a.district_id, ST_Distance(a.coordinate, c.coordinate) AS dist_m
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 5000)
),
wind AS (
  SELECT AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_wind_speed,
         AVG(wind_degree) AS avg_wind_degree,
         COUNT(*) AS wind_grid_count
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE w.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
near_aq_16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co, n.dist_m
  FROM near_stations n
  JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = n.id
  WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
),
near_aq_15 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co
  FROM near_stations n
  JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = n.id
  WHERE h.timestamp = (:ts::timestamp - interval '1 hour')
),
city_aq_16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station a ON a.id = h.station_id
  JOIN comp c ON a.city_id = c.city_id
  WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
),
district_aq_16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station a ON a.id = h.station_id
  JOIN comp c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
  WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
),
alerts AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS alert_count,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity_level IN ('HIGH','SEVERE','EMERGENCY')) AS serious_alert_count
  FROM station_high_pollution_alert al
  JOIN near_stations n ON n.id = al.station_id
  WHERE al.timestamp = :ts
)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission WHERE company_id=:company_id AND timestamp=:ts) AS emission_rows,
  (SELECT exhaust_gas FROM emis) AS exhaust_gas,
  (SELECT nox FROM emis) AS nox,
  (SELECT so2 FROM emis) AS so2,
  (SELECT pm FROM emis) AS pm,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM near_stations) AS stations_within_5km,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM near_aq_16) AS station_readings_16,
  (SELECT AVG(dist_m) FROM near_aq_16) AS avg_station_distance_m,
  (SELECT MIN(dist_m) FROM near_aq_16) AS min_station_distance_m,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_avg_aqi_16,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_avg_pm25_16,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_avg_pm10_16,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_avg_so2_16,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_avg_no2_16,
  (SELECT AVG(co) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_avg_co_16,
  (SELECT MAX(aqi) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_max_aqi_16,
  (SELECT MAX(pm2_5) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_max_pm25_16,
  (SELECT MAX(pm10) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_max_pm10_16,
  (SELECT MAX(so2) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_max_so2_16,
  (SELECT MAX(no2) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_max_no2_16,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM near_aq_15) AS near_avg_aqi_15,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM near_aq_15) AS near_avg_pm25_15,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM near_aq_15) AS near_avg_pm10_15,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM near_aq_15) AS near_avg_so2_15,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM near_aq_15) AS near_avg_no2_15,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_avg_aqi_16,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_avg_pm25_16,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_avg_pm10_16,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_avg_so2_16,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_avg_no2_16,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_avg_aqi_16,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_avg_pm25_16,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_avg_pm10_16,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_avg_so2_16,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_avg_no2_16,
  (SELECT avg_wind_speed FROM wind) AS avg_wind_speed_10km,
  (SELECT avg_wind_degree FROM wind) AS avg_wind_degree_10km,
  (SELECT wind_grid_count FROM wind) AS wind_grid_count_10km,
  (SELECT alert_count FROM alerts) AS alert_count_16,
  (SELECT serious_alert_count FROM alerts) AS serious_alert_count_16
""")

summary = pd.read_sql(q, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "ts": ts}).iloc[0].to_dict()

# 按风向将5公里站点分为下风向/侧风向/上风向，并汇总16:00空气质量
q_dir = text("""
WITH comp AS (
  SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id=:company_id
),
wind AS (
  SELECT AVG(wind_degree) AS wind_from_degree
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE w.timestamp=:ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
near AS (
  SELECT a.id,
         ST_Azimuth(c.coordinate::geometry, a.coordinate::geometry) * 180 / PI() AS bearing_deg
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 5000)
),
classified AS (
  SELECT n.id,
         CASE
           WHEN ABS(MOD((n.bearing_deg - MOD(w.wind_from_degree + 180, 360) + 540)::numeric, 360) - 180) <= 45 THEN 'downwind'
           WHEN ABS(MOD((n.bearing_deg - w.wind_from_degree + 540)::numeric, 360) - 180) <= 45 THEN 'upwind'
           ELSE 'crosswind'
         END AS wind_sector
  FROM near n CROSS JOIN wind w
)
SELECT wind_sector, COUNT(*) AS station_readings,
       AVG(h.aqi) AS avg_aqi, AVG(h.pm2_5) AS avg_pm25, AVG(h.pm10) AS avg_pm10,
       AVG(h.so2) AS avg_so2, AVG(h.no2) AS avg_no2, MAX(h.aqi) AS max_aqi
FROM classified c
JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=c.id
WHERE h.timestamp=:ts
GROUP BY wind_sector
ORDER BY wind_sector
""")
dir_summary = pd.read_sql(q_dir, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "ts": ts})

flue_gas_1600 = float(summary["exhaust_gas"]) if pd.notna(summary["exhaust_gas"]) else float("nan")
nox_1600 = float(summary["nox"]) if pd.notna(summary["nox"]) else float("nan")
so2_1600 = float(summary["so2"]) if pd.notna(summary["so2"]) else float("nan")
pm_1600 = float(summary["pm"]) if pd.notna(summary["pm"]) else float("nan")
stations_within_5km = int(summary["stations_within_5km"]) if pd.notna(summary["stations_within_5km"]) else 0

def rd(x):
    return None if pd.isna(x) else round(float(x), 3)

print("核心排放与站点覆盖：", {
    "排放记录数": int(summary["emission_rows"]),
    "烟气量": rd(summary["exhaust_gas"]),
    "NOx": rd(summary["nox"]),
    "SO2": rd(summary["so2"]),
    "PM": rd(summary["pm"]),
    "5公里内站点数": stations_within_5km,
    "16时有效站点读数": int(summary["station_readings_16"])
})
print("5公里内16时空气质量汇总：", {k: rd(summary[k]) for k in [
    "avg_station_distance_m","min_station_distance_m","near_avg_aqi_16","near_max_aqi_16",
    "near_avg_pm25_16","near_max_pm25_16","near_avg_pm10_16","near_max_pm10_16",
    "near_avg_so2_16","near_max_so2_16","near_avg_no2_16","near_max_no2_16","near_avg_co_16"
]})
print("5公里内较15时变化：", {
    "AQI变化": rd(summary["near_avg_aqi_16"] - summary["near_avg_aqi_15"]),
    "PM2.5变化": rd(summary["near_avg_pm25_16"] - summary["near_avg_pm25_15"]),
    "PM10变化": rd(summary["near_avg_pm10_16"] - summary["near_avg_pm10_15"]),
    "SO2变化": rd(summary["near_avg_so2_16"] - summary["near_avg_so2_15"]),
    "NO2变化": rd(summary["near_avg_no2_16"] - summary["near_avg_no2_15"])
})
print("相对区域均值差异：", {
    "AQI-城市均值": rd(summary["near_avg_aqi_16"] - summary["city_avg_aqi_16"]),
    "PM2.5-城市均值": rd(summary["near_avg_pm25_16"] - summary["city_avg_pm25_16"]),
    "PM10-城市均值": rd(summary["near_avg_pm10_16"] - summary["city_avg_pm10_16"]),
    "SO2-城市均值": rd(summary["near_avg_so2_16"] - summary["city_avg_so2_16"]),
    "NO2-城市均值": rd(summary["near_avg_no2_16"] - summary["city_avg_no2_16"]),
    "AQI-所在区均值": rd(summary["near_avg_aqi_16"] - summary["district_avg_aqi_16"]),
    "PM2.5-所在区均值": rd(summary["near_avg_pm25_16"] - summary["district_avg_pm25_16"]),
    "PM10-所在区均值": rd(summary["near_avg_pm10_16"] - summary["district_avg_pm10_16"]),
    "SO2-所在区均值": rd(summary["near_avg_so2_16"] - summary["district_avg_so2_16"]),
    "NO2-所在区均值": rd(summary["near_avg_no2_16"] - summary["district_avg_no2_16"])
})
print("风场与预警汇总：", {
    "10公里风场网格数": int(summary["wind_grid_count_10km"]) if pd.notna(summary["wind_grid_count_10km"]) else 0,
    "平均风速": rd(summary["avg_wind_speed_10km"]),
    "平均来向角度": rd(summary["avg_wind_degree_10km"]),
    "5公里站点预警数": int(summary["alert_count_16"]) if pd.notna(summary["alert_count_16"]) else 0,
    "较重及以上预警数": int(summary["serious_alert_count_16"]) if pd.notna(summary["serious_alert_count_16"]) else 0
})
print("按风向扇区汇总：", dir_summary.round(3).to_dict("records"))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

company_id = 2452
ts = "2025-06-10 16:00:00"

q = text("""
WITH comp AS (
  SELECT id, city_id, district_id, coordinate
  FROM polluting_company
  WHERE id = :company_id
),
emis AS (
  SELECT exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id AND timestamp = :ts
),
near_stations AS (
  SELECT a.id, a.city_id, a.district_id, ST_Distance(a.coordinate, c.coordinate) AS dist_m
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 5000)
),
wind AS (
  SELECT AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_wind_speed, AVG(wind_degree) AS avg_wind_degree, COUNT(*) AS wind_grid_count
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE w.timestamp = :ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
near_aq_16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2, h.co, n.dist_m
  FROM near_stations n JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = n.id
  WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
),
near_aq_15 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM near_stations n JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id = n.id
  WHERE h.timestamp = (:ts::timestamp - interval '1 hour')
),
city_aq_16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h JOIN air_quality_station a ON a.id = h.station_id JOIN comp c ON a.city_id = c.city_id
  WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
),
district_aq_16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h JOIN air_quality_station a ON a.id = h.station_id JOIN comp c ON a.district_id = c.district_id
  WHERE h.timestamp = :ts
),
alerts AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS alert_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE severity_level IN ('HIGH','SEVERE','EMERGENCY')) AS serious_alert_count
  FROM station_high_pollution_alert al JOIN near_stations n ON n.id = al.station_id
  WHERE al.timestamp = :ts
)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission WHERE company_id=:company_id AND timestamp=:ts) AS emission_rows,
  (SELECT exhaust_gas FROM emis) AS exhaust_gas, (SELECT nox FROM emis) AS nox, (SELECT so2 FROM emis) AS so2, (SELECT pm FROM emis) AS pm,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM near_stations) AS stations_within_5km, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM near_aq_16) AS station_readings_16,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_aqi, (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_pm10, (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_so2, (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM near_aq_16) AS near_no2,
  (SELECT MAX(aqi) FROM near_aq_16) AS max_aqi, (SELECT MAX(pm2_5) FROM near_aq_16) AS max_pm25,
  (SELECT MAX(pm10) FROM near_aq_16) AS max_pm10, (SELECT MAX(so2) FROM near_aq_16) AS max_so2, (SELECT MAX(no2) FROM near_aq_16) AS max_no2,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM near_aq_15) AS prev_aqi, (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM near_aq_15) AS prev_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM near_aq_15) AS prev_pm10, (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM near_aq_15) AS prev_so2, (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM near_aq_15) AS prev_no2,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_aqi, (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_pm10, (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_so2, (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM city_aq_16) AS city_no2,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_aqi, (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_pm10, (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_so2, (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM district_aq_16) AS district_no2,
  (SELECT avg_wind_speed FROM wind) AS wind_speed, (SELECT avg_wind_degree FROM wind) AS wind_degree, (SELECT wind_grid_count FROM wind) AS wind_n,
  (SELECT alert_count FROM alerts) AS alert_n, (SELECT serious_alert_count FROM alerts) AS serious_alert_n
""")
s = pd.read_sql(q, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "ts": ts}).iloc[0]

q_dir = text("""
WITH comp AS (SELECT coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id=:company_id),
wind AS (
  SELECT AVG(wind_degree) AS wd FROM hourly_grid_wind w CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE w.timestamp=:ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
near AS (
  SELECT a.id, ST_Azimuth(c.coordinate::geometry, a.coordinate::geometry) * 180 / PI() AS bearing
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 5000)
),
cls AS (
  SELECT n.id,
    CASE
      WHEN ABS(MOD((n.bearing - MOD(w.wd + 180, 360) + 540)::numeric, 360) - 180) <= 45 THEN '下风向'
      WHEN ABS(MOD((n.bearing - w.wd + 540)::numeric, 360) - 180) <= 45 THEN '上风向'
      ELSE '侧风向'
    END AS sector
  FROM near n CROSS JOIN wind w
)
SELECT sector, COUNT(*) AS n, AVG(h.aqi) AS aqi, AVG(h.pm2_5) AS pm25, AVG(h.pm10) AS pm10, AVG(h.so2) AS so2, AVG(h.no2) AS no2
FROM cls JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=cls.id
WHERE h.timestamp=:ts
GROUP BY sector
ORDER BY sector
""")
dir_summary = pd.read_sql(q_dir, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "ts": ts})

flue_gas_1600 = float(s["exhaust_gas"]) if pd.notna(s["exhaust_gas"]) else float("nan")
nox_1600 = float(s["nox"]) if pd.notna(s["nox"]) else float("nan")
so2_1600 = float(s["so2"]) if pd.notna(s["so2"]) else float("nan")
pm_1600 = float(s["pm"]) if pd.notna(s["pm"]) else float("nan")
stations_within_5km = int(s["stations_within_5km"]) if pd.notna(s["stations_within_5km"]) else 0

def r(x): return None if pd.isna(x) else round(float(x), 2)
essential = {
    "排放": {"烟气量": r(flue_gas_1600), "NOx": r(nox_1600), "SO2": r(so2_1600), "PM": r(pm_1600)},
    "监测": {"5km站点数": stations_within_5km, "有效读数": int(s["station_readings_16"])},
    "5km均值": {"AQI": r(s["near_aqi"]), "PM2.5": r(s["near_pm25"]), "PM10": r(s["near_pm10"]), "SO2": r(s["near_so2"]), "NO2": r(s["near_no2"])},
    "较15时变化": {"AQI": r(s["near_aqi"]-s["prev_aqi"]), "PM2.5": r(s["near_pm25"]-s["prev_pm25"]), "PM10": r(s["near_pm10"]-s["prev_pm10"]), "SO2": r(s["near_so2"]-s["prev_so2"]), "NO2": r(s["near_no2"]-s["prev_no2"])},
    "较城市均值": {"AQI": r(s["near_aqi"]-s["city_aqi"]), "PM2.5": r(s["near_pm25"]-s["city_pm25"]), "PM10": r(s["near_pm10"]-s["city_pm10"]), "SO2": r(s["near_so2"]-s["city_so2"]), "NO2": r(s["near_no2"]-s["city_no2"])},
    "较区县均值": {"AQI": r(s["near_aqi"]-s["district_aqi"]), "PM2.5": r(s["near_pm25"]-s["district_pm25"]), "PM10": r(s["near_pm10"]-s["district_pm10"]), "SO2": r(s["near_so2"]-s["district_so2"]), "NO2": r(s["near_no2"]-s["district_no2"])},
    "风场和预警": {"风速": r(s["wind_speed"]), "来向角": r(s["wind_degree"]), "风场点数": int(s["wind_n"] or 0), "预警数": int(s["alert_n"] or 0), "较重及以上": int(s["serious_alert_n"] or 0)}
}
print(essential)
print(dir_summary.round(2).to_string(index=False))

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

company_id = 2452
ts = "2025-06-10 16:00:00"

q = text("""
WITH comp AS (
  SELECT city_id, district_id, coordinate
  FROM polluting_company
  WHERE id = :company_id
),
emis AS (
  SELECT exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id AND timestamp = :ts
),
near_stations AS (
  SELECT a.id
  FROM air_quality_station a CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate, c.coordinate, 5000)
),
near16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM near_stations n JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=n.id
  WHERE h.timestamp=:ts
),
near15 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM near_stations n JOIN hourly_station_air_quality h ON h.station_id=n.id
  WHERE h.timestamp=(:ts::timestamp - interval '1 hour')
),
city16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station a ON a.id=h.station_id
  JOIN comp c ON a.city_id=c.city_id
  WHERE h.timestamp=:ts
),
dist16 AS (
  SELECT h.aqi, h.pm2_5, h.pm10, h.so2, h.no2
  FROM hourly_station_air_quality h
  JOIN air_quality_station a ON a.id=h.station_id
  JOIN comp c ON a.district_id=c.district_id
  WHERE h.timestamp=:ts
),
wind AS (
  SELECT AVG(wind_speed) wind_speed, AVG(wind_degree) wind_degree, COUNT(*) wind_n
  FROM hourly_grid_wind w CROSS JOIN comp c
  WHERE w.timestamp=:ts AND ST_DWithin(w.coordinate, c.coordinate, 10000)
),
alerts AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) alert_n
  FROM station_high_pollution_alert al JOIN near_stations n ON al.station_id=n.id
  WHERE al.timestamp=:ts
)
SELECT
  (SELECT exhaust_gas FROM emis) exhaust_gas,
  (SELECT nox FROM emis) nox,
  (SELECT so2 FROM emis) so2,
  (SELECT pm FROM emis) pm,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM near_stations) stations_5km,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM near16) readings_16,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM near16) near_aqi,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM near16) near_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM near16) near_pm10,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM near16) near_so2,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM near16) near_no2,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM near15) prev_aqi,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM near15) prev_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM near15) prev_pm10,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM near15) prev_so2,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM near15) prev_no2,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM city16) city_aqi,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM city16) city_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM city16) city_pm10,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM city16) city_so2,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM city16) city_no2,
  (SELECT AVG(aqi) FROM dist16) dist_aqi,
  (SELECT AVG(pm2_5) FROM dist16) dist_pm25,
  (SELECT AVG(pm10) FROM dist16) dist_pm10,
  (SELECT AVG(so2) FROM dist16) dist_so2,
  (SELECT AVG(no2) FROM dist16) dist_no2,
  (SELECT wind_speed FROM wind) wind_speed,
  (SELECT wind_degree FROM wind) wind_degree,
  (SELECT wind_n FROM wind) wind_n,
  (SELECT alert_n FROM alerts) alert_n
""")

s = pd.read_sql(q, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "ts": ts}).iloc[0]

flue_gas_1600 = float(s.exhaust_gas) if pd.notna(s.exhaust_gas) else float("nan")
nox_1600 = float(s.nox) if pd.notna(s.nox) else float("nan")
so2_1600 = float(s.so2) if pd.notna(s.so2) else float("nan")
pm_1600 = float(s.pm) if pd.notna(s.pm) else float("nan")
stations_within_5km = int(s.stations_5km) if pd.notna(s.stations_5km) else 0

def rr(x):
    return None if pd.isna(x) else round(float(x), 2)

analysis_result_2452_1600 = {
    "emission": {"flue_gas": rr(flue_gas_1600), "nox": rr(nox_1600), "so2": rr(so2_1600), "pm": rr(pm_1600)},
    "stations": {"within_5km": stations_within_5km, "valid_readings": int(s.readings_16)},
    "near_5km_mean": {"aqi": rr(s.near_aqi), "pm25": rr(s.near_pm25), "pm10": rr(s.near_pm10), "so2": rr(s.near_so2), "no2": rr(s.near_no2)},
    "hourly_change": {"aqi": rr(s.near_aqi-s.prev_aqi), "pm25": rr(s.near_pm25-s.prev_pm25), "pm10": rr(s.near_pm10-s.prev_pm10), "so2": rr(s.near_so2-s.prev_so2), "no2": rr(s.near_no2-s.prev_no2)},
    "vs_city": {"aqi": rr(s.near_aqi-s.city_aqi), "pm25": rr(s.near_pm25-s.city_pm25), "pm10": rr(s.near_pm10-s.city_pm10), "so2": rr(s.near_so2-s.city_so2), "no2": rr(s.near_no2-s.city_no2)},
    "vs_district": {"aqi": rr(s.near_aqi-s.dist_aqi), "pm25": rr(s.near_pm25-s.dist_pm25), "pm10": rr(s.near_pm10-s.dist_pm10), "so2": rr(s.near_so2-s.dist_so2), "no2": rr(s.near_no2-s.dist_no2)},
    "wind_alert": {"wind_speed": rr(s.wind_speed), "wind_from_degree": rr(s.wind_degree), "wind_points": int(s.wind_n or 0), "alerts": int(s.alert_n or 0)}
}

print("完成：已计算排放、5公里监测均值、前一小时变化、区域差异、风场和预警摘要。")

from sqlalchemy import text
import math

sql = text("""
WITH c AS (SELECT city_id,district_id,coordinate FROM polluting_company WHERE id=2452),
e AS (SELECT exhaust_gas,nox,so2,pm FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission WHERE company_id=2452 AND timestamp='2025-06-10 16:00:00'),
ns AS (SELECT a.id FROM air_quality_station a,c WHERE ST_DWithin(a.coordinate,c.coordinate,5000)),
n16 AS (SELECT AVG(aqi) aqi,AVG(pm2_5) pm25,AVG(pm10) pm10,AVG(so2) so2,AVG(no2) no2,COUNT(*) n FROM hourly_station_air_quality h JOIN ns ON h.station_id=ns.id WHERE h.timestamp='2025-06-10 16:00:00'),
n15 AS (SELECT AVG(aqi) aqi,AVG(pm2_5) pm25,AVG(pm10) pm10,AVG(so2) so2,AVG(no2) no2 FROM hourly_station_air_quality h JOIN ns ON h.station_id=ns.id WHERE h.timestamp='2025-06-10 15:00:00'),
ca AS (SELECT AVG(aqi) aqi,AVG(pm2_5) pm25,AVG(pm10) pm10,AVG(so2) so2,AVG(no2) no2 FROM hourly_station_air_quality h JOIN air_quality_station a ON h.station_id=a.id,c WHERE h.timestamp='2025-06-10 16:00:00' AND a.city_id=c.city_id),
da AS (SELECT AVG(aqi) aqi,AVG(pm2_5) pm25,AVG(pm10) pm10,AVG(so2) so2,AVG(no2) no2 FROM hourly_station_air_quality h JOIN air_quality_station a ON h.station_id=a.id,c WHERE h.timestamp='2025-06-10 16:00:00' AND a.district_id=c.district_id),
w AS (SELECT AVG(wind_speed) ws,AVG(wind_degree) wd,COUNT(*) wn FROM hourly_grid_wind g,c WHERE g.timestamp='2025-06-10 16:00:00' AND ST_DWithin(g.coordinate,c.coordinate,10000)),
al AS (SELECT COUNT(*) an FROM station_high_pollution_alert x JOIN ns ON x.station_id=ns.id WHERE x.timestamp='2025-06-10 16:00:00')
SELECT e.exhaust_gas,e.nox,e.so2,e.pm,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ns) st,n16.n read_n,
n16.aqi naqi,n16.pm25 npm25,n16.pm10 npm10,n16.so2 nso2,n16.no2 nno2,
n16.aqi-n15.aqi daqi,n16.pm25-n15.pm25 dpm25,n16.pm10-n15.pm10 dpm10,n16.so2-n15.so2 dso2,n16.no2-n15.no2 dno2,
n16.aqi-ca.aqi caqi,n16.pm25-ca.pm25 cpm25,n16.pm10-ca.pm10 cpm10,n16.so2-ca.so2 cso2,n16.no2-ca.no2 cno2,
n16.aqi-da.aqi qaqi,n16.pm25-da.pm25 qpm25,n16.pm10-da.pm10 qpm10,n16.so2-da.so2 qso2,n16.no2-da.no2 qno2,
w.ws,w.wd,w.wn,al.an
FROM e,n16,n15,ca,da,w,al
""")
with engine.connect() as con:
    r = con.execute(sql).mappings().one()

flue_gas_1600 = float(r["exhaust_gas"]) if r["exhaust_gas"] is not None else float("nan")
nox_1600 = float(r["nox"]) if r["nox"] is not None else float("nan")
so2_1600 = float(r["so2"]) if r["so2"] is not None else float("nan")
pm_1600 = float(r["pm"]) if r["pm"] is not None else float("nan")
stations_within_5km = int(r["st"])

def v(x): return None if x is None or (isinstance(x,float) and math.isnan(x)) else round(float(x),2)
analysis_result_2452_1600 = {
    "排放": {"烟气量": v(flue_gas_1600), "NOx": v(nox_1600), "SO2": v(so2_1600), "PM": v(pm_1600)},
    "5公里": {"站点数": stations_within_5km, "有效读数": int(r["read_n"]), "AQI": v(r["naqi"]), "PM2.5": v(r["npm25"]), "PM10": v(r["npm10"]), "SO2": v(r["nso2"]), "NO2": v(r["nno2"])},
    "较15时变化": {"AQI": v(r["daqi"]), "PM2.5": v(r["dpm25"]), "PM10": v(r["dpm10"]), "SO2": v(r["dso2"]), "NO2": v(r["dno2"])},
    "较城市均值": {"AQI": v(r["caqi"]), "PM2.5": v(r["cpm25"]), "PM10": v(r["cpm10"]), "SO2": v(r["cso2"]), "NO2": v(r["cno2"])},
    "较所在区均值": {"AQI": v(r["qaqi"]), "PM2.5": v(r["qpm25"]), "PM10": v(r["qpm10"]), "SO2": v(r["qso2"]), "NO2": v(r["qno2"])},
    "风场预警": {"风速": v(r["ws"]), "来向角": v(r["wd"]), "风场点数": int(r["wn"]), "预警数": int(r["an"])}
}
print("完成")
